TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kosuy = Rudan ta cbeyo hayan we mhuma so pnhgalan uuqun daha nanaq ma, uxe duri we mrriyux kana so dnoi daha, ini kela mbbaruy. Peeyah ka yahun ta na qmlahang Tanah Tunux dige, kika hani ta mkela maanu kesun ka pila. Betaq Telu nii ka meyah smriyux qmlahang ita de, ciida ka mkela ta gmbaruy pnhuma ma, sriyux ta pila ka ita Seediq. "Kosuy" nii ngungalan pila dseediq alang hani hari dehuk ka Telu nii, ye ba knxalan 1960 ciida. Ini daha tnyaani kari Seediq, kosuy ge kari Tanah Tunux. So hari brehengin qtaun kosuy nii, mnugaya han we mkteru knkawas pnhmaan de qbrungun texal, bobo na de mndaha qmburung knkingal knkawas denu. Qmburung kosuy nii ge dungeun hayan, mdengu de bkeun pupu paru ma, hqulun gmutu behing kosuy. Hungedun de moda psbeyuq rekaki ka hengak na, iyu kosuy kesun ka beyuq na nii, snmanun rusuq paru ma pssliyun kulu iyu. Mkere ba sbaruy iyu kosuy nii ciida, ririh so pila iyu kosuy nii wada pkmekul pheyu sapah bgurah dseeiq alang knxalan ciida.
S.PHON: = kosuj = …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo ńßajan w…ô mńßuma so pnńßgalan uuqun dańßa nanaq ma, ux…ô du…ĺi w…ô m…ĺ…ĺijux kana so dnoi dańßa, ini k…ôla mbba…ĺuj. p…ô…ôańß ka jańßun ta na qmlańßaŇč tanańß tunux dig…ô, kika ńßani ta mk…ôla maanu k…ôsun ka pila. b…ôtaq t…ôlu nii ka m…ôańß sm…ĺijux qmlańßaŇč ita d…ô, ¶iida ka mk…ôla ta gmba…ĺuj pnńßuma ma, s…ĺijux ta pila ka ita s…ô…ôdiq. "kosuj" nii ŇčuŇčalan pila ds…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ńßani ńßa…ĺi d…ôńßuk ka t…ôlu nii, j…ô ba knxalan **** ¶iida. ini dańßa tnjaani ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq, kosuj g…ô ka…ĺi tanańß tunux. so ńßa…ĺi b…ĺ…ôńß…ôŇčin qtaun kosuj nii, mnugaja ńßan w…ô mkt…ô…ĺu knkawas pnńßmaan d…ô qb…ĺuŇčun t…ôxal, bobo na d…ô mndańßa qmbu…ĺuŇč knkiŇčal knkawas d…ônu. qmbu…ĺuŇč kosuj nii g…ô duŇč…ôun ńßajan, md…ôŇču d…ô bk…ôun pupu pa…ĺu ma, ńßqulun gmutu b…ôńßiŇč kosuj. ńßuŇč…ôdun d…ô moda psb…ôuq …ĺ…ôkaki ka ńß…ôŇčak na, iju kosuj k…ôsun ka b…ôuq na nii, snmanun …ĺusuq pa…ĺu ma psslijun kulu iju. mk…ô…ĺ…ô ba sba…ĺuj iju kosuj nii ¶iida, …ĺi…ĺińß so pila iju kosuj nii wada pkm…ôkul pńß…ôu sapańß bgu…ĺańß ds…ô…ôiq alaŇč knxalan ¶iida.
S.FORM: = Kosuy = Rudan ta cbeyo hayan we mhuma so pnhgalan uuqun daha nanaq ma, uxe duri we mrriyux kana so dnoi daha, ini kela mbbaruy. Peeyah ka yahun ta na qmlahang Tanah Tunux dige, kika hani ta mkela maanu kesun ka pila. Betaq Telu nii ka meyah smriyux qmlahang ita de, ciida ka mkela ta gmbaruy pnhuma ma, sriyux ta pila ka ita Seediq. "Kosuy" nii ngungalan pila dseediq alang hani hari dehuk ka Telu nii, ye ba knxalan 1960 ciida. Ini daha tnyaani kari Seediq, kosuy ge kari Tanah Tunux. So hari brehengin qtaun kosuy nii, mnugaya han we mkteru knkawas pnhmaan de qbrungun texal, bobo na de mndaha qmburung knkingal knkawas denu. Qmburung kosuy nii ge dungeun hayan, mdengu de bkeun pupu paru ma, hqulun gmutu behing kosuy. Hungedun de moda psbeyuq rekaki ka hengak na, iyu kosuy kesun ka beyuq na nii, snmanun rusuq paru ma pssliyun kulu iyu. Mkere ba sbaruy iyu kosuy nii ciida, ririh so pila iyu kosuy nii wada pkmekul pheyu sapah bgurah dseeiq alang knxalan ciida.
S.PHON: = kosuj = …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo ńßajan w…ô mńßuma so pnńßgalan uuqun dańßa nanaq ma, ux…ô du…ĺi w…ô m…ĺ…ĺijux kana so dnoi dańßa, ini k…ôla mbba…ĺuj. p…ô…ôańß ka jańßun ta na qmlańßaŇč tanańß tunux dig…ô, kika ńßani ta mk…ôla maanu k…ôsun ka pila. b…ôtaq t…ôlu nii ka m…ôańß sm…ĺijux qmlańßaŇč ita d…ô, ¶iida ka mk…ôla ta gmba…ĺuj pnńßuma ma, s…ĺijux ta pila ka ita s…ô…ôdiq. "kosuj" nii ŇčuŇčalan pila ds…ô…ôdiq alaŇč ńßani ńßa…ĺi d…ôńßuk ka t…ôlu nii, j…ô ba knxalan **** ¶iida. ini dańßa tnjaani ka…ĺi s…ô…ôdiq, kosuj g…ô ka…ĺi tanańß tunux. so ńßa…ĺi b…ĺ…ôńß…ôŇčin qtaun kosuj nii, mnugaja ńßan w…ô mkt…ô…ĺu knkawas pnńßmaan d…ô qb…ĺuŇčun t…ôxal, bobo na d…ô mndańßa qmbu…ĺuŇč knkiŇčal knkawas d…ônu. qmbu…ĺuŇč kosuj nii g…ô duŇč…ôun ńßajan, md…ôŇču d…ô bk…ôun pupu pa…ĺu ma, ńßqulun gmutu b…ôńßiŇč kosuj. ńßuŇč…ôdun d…ô moda psb…ôuq …ĺ…ôkaki ka ńß…ôŇčak na, iju kosuj k…ôsun ka b…ôuq na nii, snmanun …ĺusuq pa…ĺu ma psslijun kulu iju. mk…ô…ĺ…ô ba sba…ĺuj iju kosuj nii ¶iida, …ĺi…ĺińß so pila iju kosuj nii wada pkm…ôkul pńß…ôu sapańß bgu…ĺańß ds…ô…ôiq alaŇč knxalan ¶iida.
